summary: Average recording (unknown source) paired with a middling show where Garcia was under‑the‑radar but the rest of the band delivered.
review: The lone review rates the set a modest three stars, noting that Jerry Garcia's playing was lacking while the other members were solid. No specific comments about sound quality are given, so the recording is assumed to be just passable. Overall it’s an okay listening experience for fans who don’t need stellar performance from the lead guitarist.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; rating reflects a middle‑of‑the‑road show (Garcia weak) and unknown but presumably adequate recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on clarity, mix, or source; assumed passable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; overall performance described as uneven due to Garcia’s subdued playing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia's not really on; under‑the‑radar performance.
